product.name: CalmKids Bedtime Wind-Down Gummies
product.category: Health & Household > Children's Supplements > Sleep Gummies
product.description: Chamomile + magnesium gummies that help toddlers transition to bedtime. A natural, melatonin-free nighttime gummy designed to be part of a predictable bedtime ritual. Made with chamomile and magnesium, the gummies provide gentle relaxation support to help toddlers wind down after a long day. Mild in flavor, soft in texture, and easy for little ones to enjoy.
features: Found in the baby / toddler supplements section
